programme.title: Le Québec matin
programme.desc: On reste à l'affût de toute l'actualité sur des sujets tels que la politique, l'économie, la santé, la météo et la consommation grâce à des reporters en direct sur le terrain à Montréal, Québec, Sherbrooke, Trois-Rivières, Saguenay et Rimouski.

programme.title: Mario Dumont
programme.desc: Mario Dumont vulgarise l'actualité et la commente ; émission axée sur la politique québécoise, canadienne et américaine, ainsi que l'économie.

programme.title: TVA nouvelles
programme.desc: Avec Philippe-Vincent Foisy, on reste au fait des nouvelles de dernière heure, des analyses, et la météo au bulletin d'information complet et préféré des Québécois.

programme.title: Le 14h
programme.desc: En semaine, Marie-Anne Lapierre vous informe et suit à la minute près les plus récentes nouvelles régionales, nationales et internationales.

programme.title: La joute
programme.desc: Débats, analyses et opinions sur la scène politique provinciale, fédérale, américaine et municipale, en compagnie de Paul Larocque et de ses collaborateurs de renom.

programme.title: TVA nouvelles
programme.desc: Avec Julie Marcoux, on reste au fait des nouvelles de dernière heure, des analyses de Paul Larocque, Emmanuelle Latraverse, Richard Latendresse et Mario Dumont, du sport et de la météo au bulletin d'information complet et préféré des Québécois.

programme.title: TVA nouvelles
programme.desc: Avec Julie Marcoux, on reste au fait des nouvelles de dernière heure, des analyses de Paul Larocque, Emmanuelle Latraverse, Richard Latendresse et Mario Dumont, du sport et de la météo au bulletin d'information complet et préféré des Québécois.

programme.title: À vos affaires
programme.desc: Pierre-Olivier Zappa décortique l'actualité économique et ses impacts dans le quotidien des Québécois.

programme.title: Le bilan
programme.desc: Paul Larocque, Emmanuelle Latraverse et leurs collaborateurs analysent chaque soir les nouvelles qui ont fait la manchette sur les collines parlementaires à Québec et Ottawa ainsi que la politique américaine.

programme.title: Contextes
programme.desc: Richard Latendresse, ayant un accès précieux à la Maison-Blanche, raconte et analyse l'actualité internationale avec des invités et des collaborateurs des quatre coins de la planète.

programme.title: Le 20h30
programme.desc: Émission d'information animée par Audrey Gagnon qui nous raconte les histoires qui ont marqué la journée partout au Québec.

programme.title: Undercover Cheerleader
programme.desc: A beautiful transfer student goes undercover as a cheerleader to do an exposé on the cruel culture of the squad for her school newspaper.

programme.title: Danger in the Dorm
programme.desc: After the murder of her childhood best friend, Kathleen sheds her rebellious spirit to catch the killer who's preying on women on campus. Kathleen's mother tries to protect her from suffering the same fate as her friend.

programme.title: Devil on Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: When con man Larry Ray moves into his daughter's dorm, he enthralls her friends while preying on their insecurities and fears. As the students get pulled deeper into his web of deceit, Ray's manipulation further alienates them from their families.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team must find the person who caused a jet carrying $1.2 billion in checks to crash in a suburban neighborhood.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team reluctantly aligns with two former criminals from England, Ricky Dorsey and Frankie Bolton, after a powerful arms dealer kidnaps Ricky's daughter in an attempt to obtain a dangerous weapons system.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: 911 Dispatcher Jackie Chappuies takes training rookie Hayley Kilbane into her own hands; together they face back-to-back carjackings at the same gas station and a possible overdose that calls for immediate CPR.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: Supervisor Christine Mooch Muccino drives the shift through a series of crises including a fatal car accident and a horrific shooting in broad daylight, but nothing shakes her to the core more than when she learns of a crisis at home.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: The dispatchers at CVD brace for Full Moon madness; everything breaks loose throughout the night when a traffic stop turns into a full-blown pursuit, strange lights in the sky are seen, and a major accident leaves a motorcyclist motionless.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: The shift comes together to support their pregnant teammate, Kaitlyn Schroeder, when she takes a call reporting two kids shot in the face and a caller whose childbirth doesn't go exactly to plan.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must move Happy's friend Ada, and the sterile bubble Ada lives in that protects her compromised immune system, to a secure location after a severe storm leaves the structure surrounded by dangerous debris.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team must find the person who caused a jet carrying $1.2 billion in checks to crash in a suburban neighborhood.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team reluctantly aligns with two former criminals from England, Ricky Dorsey and Frankie Bolton, after a powerful arms dealer kidnaps Ricky's daughter in an attempt to obtain a dangerous weapons system.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo's informant friend is killed while seeking information for a joint SWAT and FBI task force; when the FBI task force leader acts erratically, Jessica worries the woman's behavior will endanger the team in the field.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must move Happy's friend Ada, and the sterile bubble Ada lives in that protects her compromised immune system, to a secure location after a severe storm leaves the structure surrounded by dangerous debris.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the possible murder of Jake Sullivan (Tony Hawk), a skateboarder and video-game tester.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an IRS agent is killed trying to repossess a yacht, and another is shot to death soon afterward, the team searches for the perpetrators in a potential series of murders before tax day.

programme.desc: Hondo's informant friend is killed while seeking information for a joint SWAT and FBI task force; when the FBI task force leader acts erratically, Jessica worries the woman's behavior will endanger the team in the field.

programme.title: Twin Lies
programme.desc: When a young barista takes her twin sister's place for an escorting gig, all hell breaks loose when their mysterious client turns dangerous.

programme.title: Lethal Lookalike: The Viktoria Nasyrova Story
programme.desc: A Russian conwoman with a dark past escapes to New York and seeks to steal the identity of her Ukrainian stylist.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: 911 Dispatcher Jackie Chappuies takes training rookie Hayley Kilbane into her own hands; together they face back-to-back carjackings at the same gas station and a possible overdose that calls for immediate CPR.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: The dispatchers at CVD brace for Full Moon madness; everything breaks loose throughout the night when a traffic stop turns into a full-blown pursuit, strange lights in the sky are seen, and a major accident leaves a motorcyclist motionless.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Center
programme.desc: The shift comes together to support their pregnant teammate, Kaitlyn Schroeder, when she takes a call reporting two kids shot in the face and a caller whose childbirth doesn't go exactly to plan.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: A motorist shoots dead Whitney Gray while she shops with her young kids and teenage niece; detectives follow a trail of CCTV to track down the suspect car and discover that the killer is on the run and carrying a stash of weapons.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Texas, a man guns down Conbino Crasto during a gas station robbery; surveillance video sends police on a hunt for three masked suspects.

programme.title: Keyshia Cole: This Is My Story
programme.desc: Adopted at a young age, Keyshia Cole overcomes a difficult childhood to pursue her dream of becoming a singer. As her star begins to rise, Keyshia reunites with her two sisters while struggling to keep her biological mother in rehab.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Real Love
programme.desc: First-year college student Kendra is determined to keep things professional with Ben, her photo class partner. Despite disapproving parents, financial hardships and an unexpected pregnancy, they soon find themselves falling hard for each other.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Strength of a Woman
programme.desc: Now a successful photographer, Kendra finds herself in a failing marriage and must reckon with the decisions she made for the life she thought she wanted. When Ben unexpectedly comes back to her, she must dig deep as she's pushed to a crisis point.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Forever
programme.desc: A veteran falls head over heels for a local policewoman after returning to his hometown. However, to win her heart, he must also win the approval of her three teenage daughters.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns that he is a hustler who cons women out of their money.

programme.title: Lust, Lies, & Polygamy
programme.desc: A newly married woman uncovers a web of lies after a stranger gets caught prowling around her house.

programme.desc: When Kim's husband accidentally kills her ex, Kim directs him in a desperate cover-up that spirals into obsession.

programme.desc: During a violent home invasion in San Diego, a masked intruder shoots criminal defense lawyer Tim MacNeil in the head. And though investigators suspect a connection to his work, a composite sketch ultimately reveals a sinister plot closer to home.

programme.title: Somebody's Hiding Something
programme.desc: Police find beauty salon owner Dana Satterfield murdered in the storeroom of her South Carolina shop; their investigation spans ten years before a chance encounter can convince a key witness to reveal what he knows.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: A retired police officer fears his missing daughter has been murdered, kickstarting an investigation where the killer appears to be one step ahead; a pair of twins hold a secret that threatens to tear apart their close bond.

programme.title: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: After hearing about a religious cult stockpiling weapons on an isolated farm outside Rulo, Nebraska, FBI agents cultivate an informant from inside the group who details the torture and murder being ordered by the group's diabolical leader.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus recruits a forensic psychiatrist to join her in a quest to track, study and protect the creatures that secretly populate the world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus, Ashley and Will release three women from a crypt in Scotland and bring them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Dedicated teams in Africa and Borneo save the lives of orphaned elephants and orangutans and prepare them for release back into the wild.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Stage Fright
programme.desc: Fred and Daphne compete on a hit TV show, broadcast from an opera house with a dark history. After they reach the finals, a vengeful phantom curses the show, and the Mystery Inc. team investigates as the show goes on.

programme.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Tim joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his father's disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the duo soon discovers a plot that poses a threat to the Pokémon universe.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

programme.title: Richie Rich
programme.desc: The boy zillionaire (Macaulay Culkin) saves his parents and Rich Industries from a scheming executive (John Larroquette).

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: The Legend of Zorro
programme.desc: The masked swordsman (Antonio Banderas) and his wife (Catherine Zeta-Jones) fight a European count (Rufus Sewell) plotting to block California's statehood.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane hatches a secret plan to get everything she wants, culminating in an evening of intimacy and revealed secrets.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane and Richard must decide if their union can withstand the secrets that betrayed it; Lina reckons with her future with Aidan; Gia makes a big decision; Maggie decides to let the whole world know her name.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: The Expendables 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Barney Ross and his team cut a swath of destruction through opposing forces as they take revenge for the vicious murder of a comrade.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: H.appiness
programme.desc: An app designed to bring its users happiness helps a man build the perfect life, which he ends up destroying when he learns the app is faulty.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Suitors romance, then abandon, sisters (Emma Thompson, Kate Winslet) left destitute by their father's death in late-1800s England.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancée's (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcott's classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the king and queen of England soon unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue -- leaving the future of Downton hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian.

programme.title: William Shakespeare's Romeo & Juliet
programme.desc: Twentieth-century teenagers (Leonardo DiCaprio, Claire Danes) fall in love, despite feuding families, in an update of the classic tragedy.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Parapsychologist Elise Rainier and her team travel to Five Keys, N.M., to investigate a claim of a haunting in her childhood home. She must soon confront and destroy her greatest fear, the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

programme.title: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: After a former associate makes it his mission to end the Expendables, Barney Ross (Sylvester Stallone) assembles a team of younger, tech-savvy recruits to help take down their enemy.

programme.title: Before My Heart Falls
programme.desc: A teenager has a key moment in her life before she commits an act she will always regret.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Anthropocene: The Human Epoch
programme.desc: Filmmakers Jennifer Baichwal, Nicholas de Pencier and Edward Burtynsky travel the globe to document the impact humans have made on the planet.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: Two elfin beings search for the missing shard to an all-powerful crystal that can save their world from evil.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Teenage Sarah (Jennifer Connelly) journeys through a maze to recover her baby brother (Toby Froud) from a goblin king (David Bowie).

programme.title: Ice Age
programme.desc: A woolly mammoth (Ray Romano), a saber-toothed tiger (Denis Leary) and a sloth (John Leguizamo) find a human baby and try to reunite him with his tribe.

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) reunite to warn their friends about the danger to their homes posed by swiftly melting ice.

programme.title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Manny (Ray Romano), Diego (Denis Leary) and the rest of the gang must rescue Sid (John Leguizamo) from an underground world after Sid steals some dinosaur eggs.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Diego (Denis Leary) and Sid (John Leguizamo).

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A New Jersey teen moves to California, meets bullies and learns karate from a handyman, Mr. Miyagi.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: The unusual genetic makeup of a librarian (Eric Bana) causes him to travel back and forth through time, so that he and his beloved (Rachel McAdams) are always out of sync.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane hatches a secret plan to get everything she wants, culminating in an evening of intimacy and revealed secrets.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane and Richard must decide if their union can withstand the secrets that betrayed it; Lina reckons with her future with Aidan; Gia makes a big decision; Maggie decides to let the whole world know her name.

programme.title: Amy
programme.desc: Archival footage and personal testimonials present an intimate portrait of the life and career of British singer/songwriter Amy Winehouse.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Driven by an intense need for fame and validation, members of a dysfunctional Hollywood dynasty have lives as dramatic as any movie.

programme.title: Laurence Anyways
programme.desc: In the '90s, Laurence tells his girlfriend, Fred, that he wants to become a woman; they confront the prejudices of their friends, ignore the council of their families and brave the phobias of the society they offend.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After thieves make an escape that baffles police, Dr. Magnus suspects an abnormal's involvement; the robbery reminds Will of an old FBI case he could not solve; but this time he will.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and their colleague Allison Grant are stranded when their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range; while anxiously waiting for a rescue team, the passengers fall victim to a series of deadly attacks and vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own.

programme.title: Nelly & Simon: Mission Yeti
programme.desc: A private eye and a university research assistant search for the abominable snowman in the Himalayas.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls Movie
programme.desc: Three little girls with superpowers battle an evil monkey and its army of chemically enhanced primates.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's acclaimed account of an English boy's life in a WWII internment camp in Japanese-occupied China.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: After an illusion goes tragically wrong, two 19th-century magicians (Hugh Jackman, Christian Bale) engage in a bitter and potentially deadly rivalry.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: Two life sentences for a 1947 double murder land an innocent man in the notorious and corrupt Maine State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq and Marvin face the aftermath of Unique's violent, clandestine comeback; Lou manages his new artist; Kanan gets through to his grandmother; Juke embraces her sexuality.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Unique forms an unlikely alliance in his vendetta against Raq while she inches closer to a new drug enterprise; Kanan takes advice from Snaps and Pop, and Jukebox's new friendship leads to a violent encounter.

programme.title: Spinster
programme.desc: A woman wrestles with her fears of loneliness when her partner breaks up with her on her 39th birthday.

programme.title: Being Canadian
programme.desc: Rob Cohen tries to find out what it really means to be Canadian.

programme.title: Drink Slay Love
programme.desc: A 16-year-old vampire discovers she has the ability to withstand sunlight. Sensing an opportunity to round up new victims, her family enrolls her in high school, where her who-cares attitude quickly makes her the coolest girl around.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: An English orphan (Kate Maberly) discovers her bitter uncle's garden with her sickly cousin (Heydon Prowse), and it is magical.

programme.title: Superman III
programme.desc: Ersatz kryptonite laced with tobacco tar splits Superman (Christopher Reeve) in two: good Clark Kent and bad Man of Steel.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus recruits a forensic psychiatrist to join her in a quest to track, study and protect the creatures that secretly populate the world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus, Ashley and Will release three women from a crypt in Scotland and bring them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! And the Legend of the Vampire
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo (Frank Welker) and the rest of the gang pose as a rock band after a vampire is seen snatching musicians from a concert in Australia.

programme.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Tim joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his father's disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the duo soon discovers a plot that poses a threat to the Pokémon universe.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The resourceful detective (Robert Downey Jr.) and his astute partner, Dr. Watson (Jude Law), meet a powerful criminal, a devotee of black magic who arises from his grave.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: The murder of Austria's crown prince leads Holmes (Robert Downey Jr.), Watson (Jude Law) and a Gypsy (Noomi Rapace) to a showdown with an evil genius named Moriarty (Jared Harris).

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: A wealthy family is held hostage for harboring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a 12-hour period in which any and all crime is legal.

programme.title: The Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The bodyguard, Michael Bryce, continues his friendship with assassin, Darius Kincaid, as they try to save Darius' wife Sonia.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane hatches a secret plan to get everything she wants, culminating in an evening of intimacy and revealed secrets.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Sloane and Richard must decide if their union can withstand the secrets that betrayed it; Lina reckons with her future with Aidan; Gia makes a big decision; Maggie decides to let the whole world know her name.

programme.title: Eighteen
programme.desc: A young man (Paul Anthony) forges new relationships after listening to the World War II stories of his grandfather.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Reluctant to take over his father's job, the son (Russell Brand) of the Easter Bunny runs away to Los Angeles, where he tricks an unemployed slacker (James Marsden) into taking care of him.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: When hard times hit the town of Swallow Falls, a failed inventor constructs a device that turns water into delicious food.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: In the '90s, a hip British agent must face his nemesis, who was cryogenically preserved since the '60s.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: The secret agent (Mike Myers) travels back in time to the 1960s to rescue his stolen mojo from Dr. Evil.

programme.title: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Austin must rescue his captive father and prevent Dr. Evil's malevolent minions from taking over the world.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: An anthropologist (Rick Schroder) leads an expedition to an underground world of prehistoric beasts and primitive man.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Sean Anderson partners with his mom's husband on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island.

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
programme.desc: To find the magic Golden Fleece and save Camp Half-Blood, demigod Percy and his friends undertake a dangerous odyssey into the area known to humans as the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Percy Jackson & the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
programme.desc: After learning, he is the son of Poseidon, a youth must prevent a war among the gods and rescue his mother from Hades, king of the underworld.

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.

programme.title: Giant Little Ones
programme.desc: Franky and Ballas are athletic, popular and living the perfect high school life until the night of Franky's 17th birthday party when an incident changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community.

programme.title: Breakaway
programme.desc: A young man is torn between his traditional Indo-Canadian family expectations and his dreams of playing hockey.

programme.desc: Daddy Warbucks (Albert Finney) protects little orphan Annie (Aileen Quinn) from Miss Hannigan (Carol Burnett) and crooks in Depression-era New York.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A New Jersey teen moves to California, meets bullies and learns karate from a handyman, Mr. Miyagi.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A boy's close encounter with an alien stranded on Earth leads to a unique friendship in Steven Spielberg's Oscar-winning film.

programme.desc: A storybook stable boy turns pirate and rescues his beloved, who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal

programme.desc: Teenage Sarah (Jennifer Connelly) journeys through a maze to recover her baby brother (Toby Froud) from a goblin king (David Bowie).

programme.title: Nelly & Simon: Mission Yeti
programme.desc: A private eye and a university research assistant search for the abominable snowman in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: An eager beagle joins undercover canines on a mission to foil a feline plot to make all people allergic to dogs.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs 2: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: Felines and canines form an unprecedented alliance to protect themselves and their humans from a rogue cat who wants to turn the world into her personal scratching post.

programme.title: Drink Slay Love
programme.desc: A 16-year-old vampire discovers she has the ability to withstand sunlight. Sensing an opportunity to round up new victims, her family enrolls her in high school, where her who-cares attitude quickly makes her the coolest girl around.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After thieves make an escape that baffles police, Dr. Magnus suspects an abnormal's involvement; the robbery reminds Will of an old FBI case he could not solve; but this time he will.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and their colleague Allison Grant are stranded when their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range; while anxiously waiting for a rescue team, the passengers fall victim to a series of deadly attacks and vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: The ruler of the future tells best friends Bill and Ted they must compose a new song to save life as we know it. But instead of writing it, they decide to travel through time to steal it from their older selves and bring harmony to the universe.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: At sea in October 1991, the crewmen (George Clooney, Mark Wahlberg, John C. Reilly) of the Andrea Gail encounter a storm with hurricane-strength winds and 100-foot waves.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York.

Earth's billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist, world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society.

programme.title: Watchmen
programme.desc: After his former colleague is murdered, a masked vigilante (Jackie Earle Haley) uncovers a plot to discredit and destroy the world's superheroes.

programme.title: Into the Forest
